tasks.description: Vite + React + TypeScript (strict) + Tailwind + Vitest scaffold
SettingsStore — typed localStorage wrapper with injected storage adapter, versioned key, defaults, subscribe/reset; tests
TimerEngine — wall-clock state machine (idle/work/break), start/pause/resume/reset/read/tick, transition events, injected now; tests cover backgrounded-tab skip
TrailModel — grass/dirt cell array with stampForward / eraseBackward / cells; idempotency + monotonicity tests
AudioChirp — Web Audio square-wave chirp with attack-decay envelope; lazy AudioContext on first user gesture
Notifier — Notification API wrapper; idempotent permission request; fires only when document.hidden
SpriteSheet loader + ChickenRenderer (walk frames, direction switch, idle when paused) with coloured-rectangle fallback
ParallaxRenderer — L0–L3 layers, clouds drift by time, far/mid/near scroll by progress factors
GroundRenderer — tiled grass strip + dirt cells from TrailModel
SceneRenderer — rAF orchestrator: TimerEngine.tick → handle transition → update TrailModel → compose frame; wires AudioChirp + Notifier on transitions
App + Scene + Controls (Start/Pause/Reset/⚙) + TimerOverlay (DOM mm:ss + phase label, pixel font) with integer canvas scaling
SettingsModal — form bound to SettingsStore with min/max validation; hosts the Skip button (skip current phase)
Notification permission requested on first Start click only; verify no permission prompt on page load
Initial sprite art dropped into /public/sprites/ (chicken-walk-right/left, idle, clouds, hills, trees, grass tiles)
Production build verification — vite build, preview run, manual smoke of one full work→break→work cycle
